overview.title: Growth Control
overview.description: Operator surface for promo inventory, invite generation, partner operations, and live referral analytics.

metrics.expiringHint: Promo codes expiring in the next 7 days.
metrics.plansHint: Plans that can be targeted by invite or promo setup.

overview.routesDescription: Growth is implemented only where backend admin coverage is real. Each route below maps to an existing operator-safe surface.

routes.promoCodes: Create, inspect, update, and deactivate campaign promo codes.
routes.inviteCodes: Generate invite batches for a specific user with optional plan targeting.
routes.partners: Promote users, review the live partner directory, and jump into customer operations.
routes.referrals: Monitor referral commissions, top referrers, and recent conversion-linked earnings.

overview.liveInventoryDescription: Current promo state pulled from the admin promo endpoint.

operatorNotes.invitesDescription: Backend exposes admin invite generation but no admin list/detail inventory yet. This module keeps deterministic batch generation and local result readback.
operatorNotes.partnersDescription: Admin can promote, search, and inspect partner-level performance, but payout moderation is still the next workflow.
operatorNotes.referralsDescription: Admin-safe overview and per-user drill-down are live. The remaining work is abuse review and deeper attribution analytics.

overview.planTargetingDescription: Growth operations already benefit from plan awareness, especially for invite batches and targeted promo setup.

promoCodes.title: Promo Inventory
promoCodes.description: Admin console for campaign codes, usage ceilings, expiry windows, and safe deactivation.
promoCodes.createPanelDescription: Expose the full admin create surface, including advanced targeting fields that are currently write-only in the API contract.
promoCodes.inspectPanelDescription: Detail route is wired to the dedicated promo endpoint, not only the list response.
promoCodes.inspectEmpty: Select a promo row to inspect it.
promoCodes.singleUseHint: Use this for one-off redemptions or tightly controlled campaigns.

metrics.totalHint: All promo records returned by admin list.
metrics.activeHint: Still redeemable and not manually disabled.
metrics.exhaustedHint: Reached max uses and likely need cleanup.

inviteCodes.title: Invite Batch Generator
inviteCodes.description: Create invite codes for a specific user with free-day grants and optional plan binding.
inviteCodes.formDescription: This route intentionally focuses on deterministic creation because the backend still lacks an admin list endpoint for invite inventory.
inviteCodes.generatedDescription: Result readback from the last successful admin batch operation.
inviteCodes.generatedEmpty: No invite codes generated in this session.
inviteCodes.backendNote: Admin coverage here is real but narrow: create batches now, add inventory and redemption analytics later when backend routes exist.

metrics.lastBatchHint: Codes returned by the latest create call.
metrics.planCatalogHint: Available plans for optional invite targeting.
metrics.modeHint: No admin list endpoint exists yet.
metrics.lastCodeHint: First code from the latest generated batch.

partners.title: Partner Operations
partners.description: Unified operator surface for partner applications, workspace inventory, lane decisions, payout review, and linked governance workflows.
partners.formDescription: Provide the mobile user UUID and trigger the real admin promotion endpoint. Workspace and application inventories refresh from live backend contracts.
partners.queueDescription: Submitted partner applications with readiness, lane statuses, and requested-info pressure.
partners.queueEmpty: No partner applications are waiting in the current queue.
partners.inventoryDescription: Search live partner workspaces across lifecycle states and open the current operational slice.
partners.inventoryEmpty: No partner workspaces matched the current filter.
partners.workspaceDescription: Current workspace identity, program posture, membership snapshot, and code inventory.
partners.workspaceEmpty: Select a workspace or application to open the operator console.
partners.applicationDescription: Review applicant profile, request info, and move the workspace through probation decisions.
partners.applicationEmpty: This workspace does not currently expose an application review record.
partners.programsEmpty: No lane memberships were returned for the selected workspace.
partners.codesEmpty: The selected workspace has no codes yet.
partners.financeDescription: Review payout accounts, approve or reject payout instructions, and inspect execution posture.
partners.payoutAccountsEmpty: No payout accounts were returned for the selected workspace.
partners.payoutInstructionsEmpty: No payout instructions are open for this workspace.
partners.payoutExecutionsEmpty: No payout executions are linked to the selected workspace.
partners.signalsDescription: Traffic declarations, creative approvals, review requests, and case signals for the selected workspace.
partners.signalsEmpty: No compliance or creative review signals are open for the selected workspace.
partners.opsLinksDescription: Risk, governance, and audit stay on their dedicated admin consoles and are linked here for fast handoff.

metrics.applicationsHint: workspace applications currently exposed to admin review
metrics.workspacesHint: partner workspaces returned by the current live inventory filter
metrics.laneDecisionsHint: non-approved lane states visible in the current application queue
metrics.financeReviewHint: payout accounts and payout instructions still requiring operator action

defaults.reasonSummary: Reviewed manually from the admin partner operations console.
defaults.requestInfoMessage: Please provide the missing operating, compliance, or lane-specific evidence so the review can continue.

referrals.title: Referral Analytics
referrals.description: Admin-safe overview of referral earnings, top referrers, and recent commission activity.
referrals.currentStateDescription: Live leaderboard pulled from admin-safe referral analytics endpoints.
referrals.topReferrersEmpty: No referral activity is available yet.
referrals.recentEmpty: No recent referral commissions were returned.
referrals.nextFocusDescription: The remaining growth gap is not raw visibility anymore. The next layer is abuse review, payout operations, and deeper attribution diagnostics.

metrics.adminSurfaceHint: total commission records visible to admin
metrics.uniqueReferrersHint: users who have earned at least one referral commission
metrics.uniqueReferredHint: unique users brought in through referral flows
